pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the generic spring-boot-starter with spring-boot-starter-web to enable web application functionality.
Add spring-kafka dependency to support Kafka integration in the application.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation dependency to enable Bean Validation support.
Add spring-boot-starter-data-jpa dependency to enable JPA data access.
Add mysql-connector-j dependency to provide the MySQL JDBC driver at runtime.
Add flyway-core dependency to enable database migration management.
Add flyway-mysql dependency to support MySQL-specific migrations with Flyway.
Add springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui dependency to generate OpenAPI documentation for the web application.
Add javafaker dependency to generate fake data for testing or seeding.
Add spring-kafka-test dependency to support unit and integration testing of Kafka components.
Add testcontainers dependency to enable container-based integration testing.
Add testcontainers mysql module to support MySQL containers in tests.
Add testcontainers junit-jupiter module to integrate Testcontainers with JUnit 5.
Add testcontainers kafka module to support Kafka containers in tests.
Add h2 database dependency for in-memory database testing.
Add flyway-maven-plugin to the build plugins to execute database migrations during the build lifecycle.

src/main/java/com/hendisantika/springboo.general_idea: Explicitly set the scan base packages in the SpringBootApplication annotation to ensure component scanning works correctly.

src/test/java/com/hendisantika/springboo.general_idea: Add Testcontainers support to spin up a Kafka instance for integration testing.
Configure dynamic test properties to point to the Testcontainers Kafka instance and an in-memory H2 database.
Inject dependencies and mock services to enable integration testing of the Kafka producer flow.
Replace the trivial context load test with a functional integration test that verifies message production and consumption.
